use_cases: Toggle boolean states in forms and settings panels
Accept terms and conditions or privacy policies
Select multiple items from a list or filter options
Enable or disable features with preference toggles
Multi-select options in surveys or questionnaires
ai_summary: A checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with proper accessibility support. Features standard focus-visible states, disabled styling, and checked state indicators. Clean minimalist design using Tailwind classes suitable for any web application requiring form controls.
